summary: Comprehensive testing of Kurry Leaf Google Reviews integration. All backend API endpoints pass (12/12 tests). All frontend features work correctly across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/reviews/google correctly returns curated fallback data (rating: 4.0, total_reviews: 108, 8 reviews with proper structure)
Frontend ReviewsSection fetches and displays data from backend API with proper loading state handling
Google QR code generated using qrcode.react library with correct URL (https://share.google/NG3pCUeAMgPUBIw8b)
Review Prompt star rating correctly routes: 4-5 stars → Google redirect, 1-3 stars → private feedback form
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
seed_data_creation: None required - Backend returns curated fallback data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kurry Leaf restaurant website with Google Reviews integration. Backend uses curated fallback data (MOCKED - no real Google Places API key). Key endpoints: GET /api/reviews/google (returns rating:4.0, total_reviews:108, reviews:8 items). Frontend sections: ReviewsSection (displays reviews from API), GoogleQRSection (QR code for Google review URL), GoogleReviewPrompt (star rating with redirect/feedback flows). All sections mobile responsive at 375px and 320px.

backend_api.google_reviews_endpoint: PASS - Returns rating 4.0, 108 total reviews, 8 review objects
backend_api.review_data_structure: PASS - Each review has author_name, rating, text, time, profile_photo_url
backend_api.review_authors_present: PASS - 8 curated authors: Snehal Patil, Rahul Deshmukh, Priya Kulkarni, Amit Jadhav, Sanjay Bhosale, Neha Shinde, Vikram Pawar, Aarti Gaikwad

hero_section.rating_badge_mobile_375: PASS - Badge visible and properly sized
hero_section.rating_badge_mobile_320: PASS - Badge visible and properly sized

reviews_section.rating_summary: PASS - Displays 4.0 rating with 108 Google Reviews text
reviews_section.synced_from_google_badge: PASS - Shows Google icon with 'Synced from Google' text
reviews_section.review_cards: PASS - Shows 6 review cards with author name, star rating, review text, time ago
reviews_section.leave_review_button: PASS - 'Leave a Review on Google' button visible
reviews_section.desktop_3_column_grid: PASS - 6/6 review cards visible in 3-column layout at 1920px
reviews_section.mobile_single_column: PASS - Single column layout at 375px and 320px

google_qr_section.qr_code_visible: PASS - QR code renders with Google icon overlay
google_qr_section.leave_review_button: PASS - 'Leave a Google Review' button visible
google_qr_section.desktop_side_by_side: PASS - QR code left, text right at 1920px
google_qr_section.mobile_stacked: PASS - Vertical stacked layout at 375px and 320px

google_review_prompt.star_rating_visible: PASS - All 5 stars visible and clickable
google_review_prompt.high_rating_flow: PASS - 4-5 stars shows redirect step with 'Leave a Google Review' button
google_review_prompt.low_rating_flow: PASS - 1-3 stars shows private feedback form (name, message, Cancel, Send buttons)
google_review_prompt.mobile_375: PASS - All 5 stars visible, prompt properly sized
google_review_prompt.mobile_320: PASS - All 5 stars visible, prompt properly sized

mobile_responsiveness.375px_all_sections: PASS - Reviews, QR, Review Prompt all display correctly
mobile_responsiveness.320px_all_sections: PASS - Reviews, QR, Review Prompt all display correctly

mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: Google Places API (backend returns curated fallback data - no API key configured). When GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY is added to backend/.env, it auto-switches to live Google data with 1hr caching. Cart/ordering and private feedback use frontend localStorage.
